message:
feat: Add global cross-platform process ID formatting utility

Created src/utils/process_fmt.zig with PID_FMT constants to handle
Windows HANDLE (*anyopaque) vs POSIX integer (i32/pid_t) process IDs.

Changes:
- New utility: src/utils/process_fmt.zig with PID_FMT/PID_FMT_OPT
- Updated daemon.zig to import from utility instead of local constants
- Uses comptime branching: "{any}" for Windows, "{d}" for POSIX
- Applied globally across codebase (daemon.zig is the only file that prints PIDs)

Fixes Windows CI build errors: "invalid format string 'd' for type '*anyopaque'"

This is a generic solution using format string constants, not repeated if statements.
